name: awesome-gbb-threadlight
description: End-to-end Threadlight engagement pipeline as a self-contained plugin. Bundles 8 threadlight-* skills (design → demo-data-factory → local-test → safe-check → deploy → event-triggers → hitl-patterns → workspace-ui) PLUS the 17 Foundry/Azure/basic skills they cross-reference at runtime (foundry-hosted-agents, foundry-memory, foundry-iq, foundry-observability, foundry-mcp-aca, foundry-evals, foundry-doc-vision-speech, foundry-teams-bot, foundry-cross-resource, ghcp-hosted-agents, azd-patterns, azure-tenant-isolation, citadel-spoke-onboarding, auto-demo-producer, gbb-humanizer, gbb-pptx, zava-workspace-deploy). Install this plugin alone for a full Threadlight pilot — no other awesome-gbb plugins required. USE FOR: scoping a Threadlight pilot, designing a process SPEC, generating demo data, local Pattern 0/1/2/3 testing, pre-deploy safe-check gate, azd deploy, HITL + Teams + event triggers, cinematic workspace UI. DO NOT USE FOR: non-Threadlight Foundry pilots — use awesome-gbb-azure instead.
author: Microsoft GBB
